North West European Shelf Production Centre 
NWSHELF_ANALYSISFORECAST_PHY_004_013 
 
 
 Issue: 3.0 
Contributors: Jonathan Tinker, Robert King, Niall McConnell, Christine Pequignet, Peter Sykes, Thorger Brüning, 
Simon Good, Susan Kay, Daniel Lea, Matthew Martin, Andrea Rochner, Andrew Saulter, Christopher Stokes. 
Approval date by the Copernicus Marine Service product quality coordination team: 04/11/2025 
 
 
 
 
  
 

QUID for NWS MFC Products 
NWSHELF_ANALYSISFORECAST_PHY_004_013 
Ref: 
Date: 
Issue: 
CMEMS-NWS-QUID-004-013 
28 May 2025 
3.0 
 
 
Page 2/77 
CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.   
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document. Column 5 should include the names of the author(s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means the 
document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

ACRONYM TABLE 
 
Acronym Description 
AMSR2 Advanced Microwave Scanning Radiometer 
AVHRR Advanced Very High Resolution Radiometer 
Argo International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
CTD CTD refers to an electronic device equipped with sensors that 
measure Conductivity, Temperature, and Depth 
DJF December, January, February – Meteorological winter. 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
EiS Enter into Service 
EOF Extended Orthogonal Function 
ERSEM European Regional Seas Ecosystem Model Biogeochemistry model 
(Butenschön et al., 2016). 
GHRSST Group for High-Resolution Sea Surface Temperature 
www.ghrsst.org 
ICES International Council for the Exploration of the Sea 
JJA June, July, August – Meteorological summer. 
MAM March, April, May – Meteorological spring. 
MDS Marine Data Store 
MLD Mixed Layer Depth 
MY Multi-year 
NBS Near (sea) Bed Salinity 
NBT Near (sea) Bed Temperature 
NRT Near Real Time 
NWS-IBI The NWS-MFC system run by the IBI-MFC from 2023-2025 
PUM Product User Manual 
REP Reprocessing 
RMSD Root Mean Square Difference 
SEVIRI Spinning Enhanced Visible Infra-Red Imager 
SLA Sea Level Anomaly 
SLSTR Sea and Land Surface Temperature Radiometer 
SON September, October, November – Meteorological autumn. 
SSH Sea Surface Height 
SSS Sea Surface Salinity 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
T4m  Temperature at 4m depth

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for North West European Shelf MFC products, detailing updates and changes to the product specifications as of May 28, 2025.

product_line.name: North West European Shelf Analysis and Forecast Products
